allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Snapshot pre-Ankora restart: full state backup

- Add Ankora/ folder with product vision docs \(README, BACKEND-API, IOS-INTEGRATION\)
- Backend: TikTok/Instagram transcription services, quiz generation updates
- Frontend: UX refonte v2.0, quiz français, notes page
- Docs: reorganized into archive/, added iOS architecture docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add iOS Expo app + update backend workers

- Add complete iOS app with Expo SDK 54
  - Tabs: Feed, Library, Reviews, Profile
  - OAuth flows for YouTube/Spotify/TikTok/Instagram
  - Quiz and memo screens
  - Content filtering and triage
  - Zustand stores + React Query hooks
- Update backend workers for TikTok and Instagram sync
- Update admin routes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore\(ios\): update domain from remember.app to ankora.study

Update production URLs and associated domains to use the new
ankora.study domain with HTTPS via Caddy + Let''s Encrypt on VPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: rebrand Remember → Ankora across iOS and backend

- app.json: name, slug, scheme, bundleIdentifier, package
- constants.ts: OAUTH_REDIRECT_SCHEME
- profile.tsx: OAuth redirect URIs
- memo/[id].tsx: share sheet title
- package.json: package name
- oauth.ts: fallback deep link redirects and HTML page titles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore\(eas\): create new EAS project @fysnerd/ankora

Replace old projectId \(remember\) with new one for ankora slug.
New EAS project ID: 41df5660-1c97-4b52-8b43-e6181bd77c16

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(backend\): paginate Spotify sync to collect 15 listened episodes

Previously fetched only 15 episodes then filtered by >80% listened,
resulting in far fewer items synced. Now paginates through saved
episodes until 15 qualifying ones are collected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
